'''makïfmïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphid|nymphid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphid|nymphid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| makïfmïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || mækïfmïfth || mækïfmïfj || mækïfmïfsh || mækïfmïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || makïfkïfmïfth || makïfkïfmïfj || makïfkïfmïfsh || makïfkïfmïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || makïfmïfth || makïfmïfj || makïfmïfsh || makïfmïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || makïffmïffth || makïffmïffj || makïffmïffsh || makïffmïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || makïfmïfïf || makïfmïfïf || makïfmïfïf || makïfmïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || makïfmïfth || makïfmïfj || makïfmïfsh || makïfmïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || makïfmïfïfl || makïfmïfïfl || makïfmïfïfl || makïfmïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || makïfmïfïfïf || makïfmïfïfïf || makïfmïfïfïf || makïfmïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || makïfmïfïfn || makïfmïfïfn || makïfmïfïfn || makïfmïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || makïfmïfïforo || makïfmïfïforo || makïfmïfïforo || makïfmïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
